untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-candle pattern recognition (3-candle sequence with uptrend context) that cannot be expressed in single-bar indicator conditions. Specifically: (1) detection of 'strong counter-trend bar' requires relative comparison to previous trend strength; (2) 'setup candle' requires 2-bar lookback; (3) entry on 'third candle' requires 3-bar pattern state tracking; (4) 'original uptrend' context requires trend confirmation logic not available in point-in-time indicators. The rule is inherently a pattern-based multi-bar strategy that requires sequence validation logic.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using body direction and lower_low detection, but this loses critical pattern context. A proper implementation would require custom pattern recognition code or bar-state machine logic outside the allowed indicator set.
